overview: Advanced Registered Nurse Practitioner specializing in functional medicine for nutritional, hormonal, thyroid, and menopausal imbalances. Offers hormone and thyroid testing, aesthetic treatments, and pain management through TheraTox™.
highlights: TheraTox™ pain treatment for TMJ, migraines, and chronic pain
targetAudience: Patients seeking functional medicine care for hormonal and thyroid imbalances, menopausal symptoms, and pain management.
